ddls:
CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle */,
  "make" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the vehicle */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the vehicle */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of manufacture */,
  "engine_number" TEXT /* Engine number of the vehicle */,
  "vin" TEXT /* Vehicle Identification Number */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the vehicle */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the vehicle */,
  "mileage" INTEGER /* Current mileage of the vehicle */,
  "stock_number" TEXT /* Stock number for internal tracking */,
  "fuel_type" TEXT /* Type of fuel the vehicle uses */,
  "transmission" TEXT /* Type of transmission */,
  "drive_type" TEXT /* Type of drive system */,
  "body_style" TEXT /* Body style of the vehicle */,
  "interior_color" TEXT /* Color of the vehicle's interior */,
  "exterior_color" TEXT /* Color of the vehicle's exterior */,
  "features" TEXT /* Additional features of the vehicle */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Condition of the vehicle */,
  "availability" TEXT /* Whether the vehicle is currently available for sale */,
  "dealership_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dealership where the vehicle is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the customer */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Mailing address of the customer */,
  "purchase_history" TEXT /* Description of the customer's purchase history */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Customer's date of birth */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Customer's gender */,
  "loyalty_points" INTEGER /* Points accumulated through loyalty programs */,
  "preferred_dealership" INTEGER /* ID of the preferred dealership */,
  "last_purchase_date" TEXT /* Date of the last purchase */,
  "last_service_date" TEXT /* Date of the last service */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle sold */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who purchased the vehicle */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "sale_price" REAL /* Sale price of the vehicle */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., cash, financing) */,
  "dealership_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dealership where the sale occurred */,
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* ID of the staff member who handled the sale */,
  "trade_in_value" REAL /* Value of any trade-in vehicle */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount paid (including any additional fees) */,
  "is_financed" INTEGER /* Whether the sale is financed */,
  "financing_details" TEXT /* Details of the financing if applicable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_dealership_id FOREIGN KEY ("dealership_id") REFERENCES dealerships ("dealership_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_staff_id FOREIGN KEY ("staff_id") REFERENCES staff ("staff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "services" (
  "service_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each service record */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle serviced */,
  "service_date" TEXT /* Date of the service */,
  "service_type" TEXT /* Type of service performed (e.g., oil change, tire rotation) */,
  "service_cost" REAL /* Cost of the service */,
  "service_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the service */,
  "dealership_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dealership where the service was performed */,
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* ID of the staff member who performed the service */,
  "next_service_date" TEXT /* Date of the next recommended service */,
  "service_status" TEXT /* Status of the service */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("service_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_services_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_services_staff_id FOREIGN KEY ("staff_id") REFERENCES staff ("staff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_services_dealership_id FOREIGN KEY ("dealership_id") REFERENCES dealerships ("dealership_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parts_inventory" (
  "part_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each part */,
  "part_name" TEXT /* Name of the part */,
  "part_number" TEXT /* Part number for reference */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the part in stock */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the part */,
  "supplier" TEXT /* Supplier of the part */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Minimum stock level at which a reorder is triggered */,
  "lead_time" INTEGER /* Time it takes to receive a new stock of the part */,
  "last_stock_update" TEXT /* Date of the last stock update */,
  "is_critical" INTEGER /* Whether the part is critical */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("part_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "warranties" (
  "warranty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each warranty record */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle associated with the warranty */,
  "warranty_period" TEXT /* Duration of the warranty (e.g., 3 years, 5 years) */,
  "warranty_provider" TEXT /* Provider of the warranty */,
  "warranty_details" TEXT /* Details of the warranty coverage */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the warranty starts */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the warranty ends */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the warranty is currently active */,
  "claim_count" INTEGER /* Number of claims made under the warranty */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("warranty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_warranties_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recalls" (
  "recall_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recall */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle affected by the recall */,
  "recall_date" TEXT /* Date the recall was issued */,
  "recall_description" TEXT /* Description of the recall issue */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the recall (e.g., resolved, pending) */,
  "affecting_models" TEXT /* Models affected by the recall */,
  "recall_priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the recall */,
  "recall_status" TEXT /* Status of the recall (e.g., open, closed) */,
  "recall_impact" TEXT /* Impact of the recall on the vehicle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recall_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recalls_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "total_sales" INTEGER /* Total number of vehicles sold */,
  "total_revenue" REAL /* Total revenue from sales */,
  "average_sale_price" REAL /* Average sale price of vehicles sold */,
  "total_trade_in_value" REAL /* Total value of trade-in vehicles */,
  "total_financed_sales" INTEGER /* Total number of financed sales */,
  "total_cash_sales" INTEGER /* Total number of cash sales */,
  "average_trade_in_value" REAL /* Average value of trade-in vehicles */,
  "average_financed_amount" REAL /* Average amount financed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the payment method (e.g., Cash, Financing) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the payment method */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the payment method is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dealerships" (
  "dealership_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dealership */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the dealership */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the dealership */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number for the dealership */,
  "opening_date" TEXT /* Date the dealership opened */,
  "total_vehicles_sold" INTEGER /* Total number of vehicles sold by the dealership */,
  "total_revenue" REAL /* Total revenue generated by the dealership */,
  "rating" REAL /* Customer satisfaction rating of the dealership */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dealership_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "staff" (
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each staff member */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the staff member */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the staff member */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the staff member */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the staff member */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the staff member (e.g., salesperson, manager) */,
  "dealership_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dealership where the staff member works */,
  "date_hired" TEXT /* Date the staff member was hired */,
  "date_left" TEXT /* Date the staff member left (if applicable) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the staff member is currently active */,
  "performance_rating" REAL /* Performance rating of the staff member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("staff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_staff_dealership_id FOREIGN KEY ("dealership_id") REFERENCES dealerships ("dealership_id")
)
